config.content.title: Explore All Rummy Formats
config.content.description: Discover the perfect rummy format for your play style. From quick games to marathon tournaments.

config.content.title: Questions About Our Games
config.content.description: Common questions about rummy formats and gameplay.
config.faq.items:
What is Points Rummy?|Points Rummy is the fastest variant where you play for points with a pre-decided rupee value. Each game is a single deal.
How do tournaments work?|Tournaments are multi-table knockout events. Players compete until one winner remains. Prize pools are announced before each tournament.
Can I play multiple games at once?|Yes! RummyRoyal supports multi-table play. You can join up to 6 tables simultaneously.
What is the minimum entry fee?|Practice tables are completely free. Cash games start from as low as ₹1 entry.
